name: Irisy
description: Irisy — CTRL's single user-facing companion. Default mode is chat (reads the vault, answers questions, drives mcp workflows). seed.content_inline:
# Irisy (companion)

Irisy is CTRL's single user-facing AI. Her chat history, saved replies, in-progress mcp drafts, and session state live here.

## Customizing Irisy's voice

Drop a file called `persona.md` into this folder to override `assets/persona.md`. The runtime prefers your vault copy.

## Internal modes (invisible to you)

Irisy dispatches between conversational mode and mcp-designer mode based on what you ask. You never switch by hand — say "help me make a clipboard tool" and she shifts; say "summarize this" and she answers.
